filledFields.label: Message to the Hiring Team
filledFields.value: I am excited to apply for the JobDetail role at Careers. My background in C/C++, Python, Java and my focus on becoming a strong Software Engineer make this opportunity especially compelling to me. I would be glad to contribute to Careers's team with a practical, detail-oriented approach to building reliable backend systems and supporting product delivery in onsite engineering environments. With my academic foundation and hands-on project work, I am confident I can add value while continuing to grow in a role aligned with Bhiwani, Haryana, India opportunities.

filledFields.label: Why are you interested in this role?
filledFields.value: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a strong Software Engineer and uses skills I have practiced through projects and coursework.

filledFields.label: What makes you a match?
filledFields.value: My background in C/C++, Python, Java, JavaScript closely matches the expectations in this job description.
